ops.body: Pack migration landed (cc-interact 5e2c272; capt-hook 10.5.0 with install_binary + evt.context). The template's hooks are now the capt-hook pack, so this matrix's runs exercise agent_plane.py, not the deleted .sh wrappers. Two smoke items folded in from the migration's live-smoke scope (everything else was covered by released-artifact smokes + CI): (1) bin/ delete → SessionStart reinstall via install_binary on a real consumer plugin (needs the cc-guides-supplied installer script, absent from the template by design); (2) a directive reaching a live child verbatim through evt.context with no permissionDecision field in the envelope (contract-tested in hooks/tests/test_pack.py; not yet observed in a live session).
